gt_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(t2.overall_rating) AS REAL) / COUNT(t2.id) FROM Player AS t1 INNER JOIN Player_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.player_api_id = t2.player_api_id WHERE t1.height > 170 AND STRFTIME('%Y',t2.`date`) >= '2010' AND STRFTIME('%Y',t2.`date`) <= '2015'
pred_sql:
SELECT CAST(SUM(t2.overall_rating) AS REAL) / COUNT(t2.id)
FROM Player t1
JOIN Player_Attributes t2 ON t1.player_api_id = t2.player_api_id
WHERE t1.height > 170
AND strftime('%Y', t2.date) >= '2010'
AND strftime('%Y', t2.date) <= '2015';
question: From 2010 to 2015, what was the average overall rating of players who are higher than 170?
